title: Ussor
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Ganathan1.jpg]] |name=Ussor |homeworld=[[Ganath/Legends|Ganath]][[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Ganathan]]{{CSWECite|III|283|Ussor, Captain}} |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Ganathan Empire]] **[[Ganathan space fleet]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|''Captain Ussor!'' Inform the council of my departure! I am leaving ''you'' in charge of the fleet until I return!''"
"''As you wish, sire.|Empatojayos Brand and Ussor|}} '''Ussor''' was the [[Ganathan]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''[[Robida Colossus]]''. Ussor was put in charge of the [[Ganathan space fleet]] by [[King/Legends|King]] [[Empatojayos Brand]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Dark Empire II 4|''Dark Empire II'' 4]] {{1st}} *[[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]] ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Ussor }} [[Category:Captains]] [[Category:Ganathans]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]]
